{{Infobox character
| name = Archlady
| species = Remnant
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|sword-Path}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emissary Kahn Mala]], [[Archlady]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, silver Remnant}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|governing territory}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Everwood]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

''See also: [[Archlady Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Archlady is a rank or title held by powerful individuals, such as Overladies and [[Emissaries]]. One notable Archlady is [[Kahn Mala]] of [[Redmoon Hall]], a human woman with gray-streaked hair and an emaciated appearance. She serves as an Emissary representing the [[Redmoon Herald]] and the [[Sage of Red Faith]], with a primary mission to provide protection. [[Kahn Mala]] possesses a serpent-shaped [[Blood Shadow]] and is known for her composed demeanor, though she can be prone to using threats. Another individual identified as an Archlady is [[Mercy]], a newly advanced practitioner who utilizes the Book of Eternal Night to augment her strength and whose personal revelation involved bringing light into darkness. The title is associated with significant spiritual milestones, including specific revelations and advancements that define a practitioner's identity and future goals.}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Archlady]] is a female human with gray-streaked hair and a [[Shadow]] in the form of a serpent.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Archlady]] is [[Emissary Kahn Mala]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The silver [[Remnant]] known as the Archlady hails from [[Everwood]] and is distinguished by a halo positioned behind her head. During her travels, she released crackling lightning-sparrows and landed upon a cliff accompanied by a [[Blood Shadow]] shaped like a snake. She is also known to travel alongside the [[Sage of Red Faith]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Archlady]] released crackling lightning-sparrows.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Archlady]] is a silver [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[sword]]-[[Path]] [[Archlady]] is from [[Everwood]] and has a halo behind her head.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An [[Archlady]] with a [[Blood Shadow]] in the form of a snake landed on a cliff.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An [[Archlady]] accompanies the [[Sage of Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Archlady]] salutes the [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An [[Archlady]] can focus on governing territory.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Archlady]] has navy hair the color of the deep ocean and skin like a summer sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A human [[Archlady]] kneels before [[Northstrider]] and wears a scripted necklace and wristbands.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“I am Emissary Kahn Mala,” the Archlady said.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
